<?php namespace Illuminate\Contracts\Database\Eloquent; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model; interface CastsInboundAttributes { /** * Transform the attribute to its underlying model values. * * @param \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model $model * @param string $key * @param mixed $value * @param array<string, mixed> $attributes * @return mixed */ public function set(Model $model, string $key, mixed $value, array $attributes); }
